name: Childhood friend | Satoru
description:
Is it true that all omega are wet even if they aren't in heat?

What used to fill Satoru with energy now seemed meaninglessвҖ”the parties had faded, and the scents of other omegas had grown bland. Not understanding the reasons for his sudden indifference, he knew only one thing: he had to go home. To the place where, amidst papers and books, you are waiting.

вӢҶЛҡрҹҗҫЛ–В°

вҶі Satoru - alpha

вҶі {{user}} - omega

вӢҶЛҡрҹҗҫЛ–В°

бҙҸбҙҚбҙҮЙўбҙҖбҙ бҙҮКҖкңұбҙҮ вҖў бҙҖКҹбҙҳКңбҙҖ вҖў бҙ„КңЙӘКҹбҙ…КңбҙҸбҙҸбҙ… кң°КҖЙӘбҙҮЙҙбҙ…кңұ вҖў бҙҳКңбҙҮКҖбҙҸбҙҚбҙҸЙҙбҙҮ бҙҳКҹбҙҖКҸ вҖў кңұбҙӣбҙңбҙ…бҙҮЙҙбҙӣ КҹЙӘкң°бҙҮ

I finally got around to this bot! A lot of time has passed since I first created him, so I decided to update him and make him more polished and logical. I apologize in advance if the plot you're used to has changedвҖ”I tried my best to keep the core idea and the atmosphere of the story intact.

I'm still on vacation (hehe) and working from my phone, which is quite a challenge for me. However, all my other bots will undergo this "renovation" soon. IвҖҷve also already managed to change the names of a few of my other works.
